hero.subtitle: Welcome to
hero.title: The HaSMaR Institute
hero.description: We Enable Individuals and Couples to Create Honorable and Sustainable Marriage Relationships.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Know more about us
about.description: We are a team of passionate individuals dedicated to providing support and resources for individuals and couples facing marriage challenges. Our mission is to empower individuals and couples to create honorable and sustainable marriage relationships by offering a range of services and resources.
